falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by 5% from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a bullish breakout rather than a continuation of the unknown phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX volatility index drops below 15 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in volatility would invalidate the blowoff score of 41, indicating reduced panic and a potential reversal of the pattern's implied risk.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume in the S&P 500 exceeds 20-day average by 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in volume would indicate a clear market conviction, contradicting the indecisive HOLD signal and suggesting a directional move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
